issues.title: Unrecognized field "audio_tokens" in chat response
issues.body:
[EDIT2]: Appears closely related to:
https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/1369

**Bug description**
Sometimes the openai api responds with a field `audio_tokens` as part of the response of `OpenAiApi$Usage$CompletionTokenDetails`, which is not present in the Java model. This leads to a `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.UnrecognizedPropertyException`. It seems random as to when a response contains this field. The issue appears in a test, and running the test multiple times leads to different and unpredictable responses, where it sometimes is added, and sometimes is not.

**Example response**

```
{
  "id": "chatcmpl-ASOLAWmDlXXXXXXXXXXXXXX",
  "object": "chat.completion",
  "created": 1731330112,
  "model": "gpt-4o-2024-08-06",
  "choices": [
    {
      "index": 0,
      "message": {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": "<redacted>.",
        "refusal": null
      },
      "logprobs": null,
      "finish_reason": "stop"
    }
  ],
  "usage": {
    "prompt_tokens": 686,
    "completion_tokens": 14,
    "total_tokens": 700,
    "prompt_tokens_details": {
      "cached_tokens": 0,
      "audio_tokens": 0
    },
    "completion_tokens_details": {
      "reasoning_tokens": 0,
      "audio_tokens": 0,
      "accepted_prediction_tokens": 0,
      "rejected_prediction_tokens": 0
    }
  },
  "system_fingerprint": "fp_xxxxxxxxcc"
}
```

**Environment**

Java 21
SimpleVectorStore, InMemoryChatMemory,

build.gradle
```
    implementation platform("org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-bom:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT")
    implementation 'org.springframework.ai:spring-ai-openai-spring-boot-starter'
```

application.properties
```
spring.ai.openai.embedding.options.model=text-embedding-3-large
chatbot.model=gpt-4o-2024-05-13
chatbot.temperature=0.7
spring.jackson.deserialization.fail-on-unknown-properties=false
```

**Steps to reproduce**
Can't get it to be reproduced reliably. This is the code:
```
            var similarDocs = vectorStore.similaritySearch(userInput);
            response = chatClient.prompt()
                    .user(u -> u.text(userInput))
                    .system(s -> s.param("context", similarDocs))
                    .call()
                    .content();
```
However, the openapi specs show this field:
https://github.com/openai/openai-openapi/blob/acff98cc02da4e0ccc51cad9cef2926da7aec9be/openapi.yaml#L11443
and that field is _not_ in the current model.

**Expected behavior**
I would expect that the response is parsed properly, rather than throw a `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.UnrecognizedPropertyException:`.

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
n/a.

**Full stack trace**

[edits]
Minor formattings, some rephrasing, and a missing `SNAPSHOT` tag in the build.gradle versions.

comments.body: This will probably be fixed by https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/1561, but more errors might happen in the future when OpenAI adds new fields. We should configure Jackson to ignore unrecognized properties to make the logic resilient whenever the API spec changes in backward-compatible ways.
